programs.title: Special Edition
programs.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programs.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programs.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programs.title: History in the Frame
programs.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programs.title: Best Eats
programs.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering.

programs.title: Youthful China
programs.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick.

programs.title: Pixel Collage
programs.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.
